title: Surgeon Vacancy at Care Hospitals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Care Hospitals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Care Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Care Hospitals:
Care Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals!
